summary: Phase 13 â€” Host listing creation flow. Backend: 10/10 pytest in test_phase13_listing.py PASS â€” covers POST /api/upload/image (png 200, txt 400, >8MB 413, no-auth 401), GET /api/uploads/<file> via StaticFiles (returns the same bytes that were uploaded), GET /api/auth/me (200 with full_name/email/registration_fee_paid; password_hash & registration_fee_payment_id stripped; 401 unauth), POST /api/subscriptions/registration-fee (returns amount=50000, currency=INR, is_mock=true, key_id, order_id; 400 when already paid), POST /api/subscriptions/registration-fee/mock-pay (idempotent 200), POST /api/subscriptions/confirm-registration-fee (Pydantic body {razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_signature} accepted with deterministic mock signature â†’ 200; bad signature â†’ 400), property_id factory uses uuid4 and 5 rapid POST /api/properties/ create unique prop_<14hex> ids, POST /api/properties/{id}/submit-verification flips status from 'draft' to 'pending_verification'. Frontend E2E (Playwright): logged in as host, navigated /host/list-property, verified form-title='List your property', step indicator with all 7 step pills (basics/location/pricing/amenities/photos/subscription/review), validation banner shows on empty Next ('Title must be at least 8 characters'), all native <select> selectors work for category/property-type/bhk-type, walked through Basicsâ†’Locationâ†’Pricingâ†’Amenitiesâ†’Photosâ†’Subscriptionâ†’Review, paste-URL fallback in Photos via add-url-btn (window.prompt) populated photos-grid, plan-list rendered 1 BHK-matching plan first, submit-listing-btn label was 'Submit listing' (not 'Pay â‚ą500 & submit') because host already had registration_fee_paid=true (matches expected adaptive label), fee-card visible on review step, after submit the success page rendered with text 'Listing submitted! Your property Sunset Villa Goa Phase13 Final E2E Test is now in the verification queue.', back-to-dashboard + list-another buttons present, click back-to-dashboard returned to /host/dashboard, the new listing's title appears in My Properties and Pending Review counter is now 3.
action_items: Minor (testid hygiene, non-blocking): the subscription step assigns data-testid='plan-list' to the container AND data-testid='plan-{plan_id}' to each card, so a CSS prefix selector [data-testid^='plan-'] matches both. Consider renaming the container to plan-list-container or using an exact-match plan-card-{id} pattern to avoid testing ambiguity. Did not affect users; only test-script writers.

Optional: backend mock-pay endpoint signature passes razorpay_order_id as a query param (FastAPI default for str args) â€” would be cleaner as a Pydantic body for parity with confirm-registration-fee. Not blocking; tests pass either way.
critical_code_review_comments: upload_routes.py reads the entire file into memory before size check â€” fine for the 8 MB cap but if the limit is ever raised, switch to streaming with a running counter (await file.read(chunk)) to avoid OOM under concurrent uploads.

upload_routes.py validates only by filename extension; consider sniffing magic bytes (or trusting file.content_type with allow-list) to reject a .png that is actually executable content. Low risk because images are served via StaticFiles with no execution path, but worth a TODO.

subscription_routes.confirm-registration-fee no longer rejects when registration_fee_paid is already True â€” it silently overwrites the payment id. Consider an idempotent 200 with 'already paid' response (consistent with mock-pay) or a guarded 400.

GET /api/auth/me strips password_hash + registration_fee_payment_id but leaks all other user fields including phone, lg_code, kyc fields. Acceptable for a /me endpoint, but worth documenting which fields are intentionally exposed.

property model property_id factory now uuid4 â€” good. Confirm the existing unique index on property_id (created in server.startup_db_indexes) tolerates the change; verified at runtime, no duplicate-key errors during the 5-id uniqueness test.
HostListProperty.js: the fee-card CTA label flips on registration_fee_paid sourced from AuthContext, which is refreshed via /api/auth/me on mount â€” verified working end-to-end.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the listing creation flow tested

test_credentials: host@propnest.com / host123 (registration_fee_paid was already True; reset to False inside the registration-fee fixture/test for negative+positive coverage)
seed_data_creation: Tests create 5 ephemeral 'TEST_phase13_uuid_listing_*' properties + 1 verification-flip property and delete them in finally blocks. Frontend E2E left ONE permanent property 'Sunset Villa Goa Phase13 Final E2E Test' (status=pending_verification) plus a few uploaded image files under /app/backend/uploads/ (filenames are uuid4 hex). Pending-review counter on host dashboard is now 3.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 13 fully verified end-to-end. The frontend form uses native HTML <select> for category/property-type/bhk-type â€” use page.select_option(value=...) (NOT shadcn Radix). The plan-list/plan-{id} testid prefix collision means future tests must filter out 'plan-list' when iterating [data-testid^="plan-"]; the helper used was `els.find(e => e.dataset.testid !== 'plan-list')`. Photos URL paste uses window.prompt â€” wire page.on('dialog', d => d.accept(url)) BEFORE clicking add-url-btn. Mock-pay endpoint signature accepts razorpay_order_id as a query param. mock-signature builder is razorpay_service.mock_complete_payment(order_id) â€” returns matching {payment_id, signature}. Host registration_fee_paid persists across test runs; reset via db.users.update_one({email:'host@propnest.com'},{'$set':{'registration_fee_paid':False}}) before re-testing the unpaid path.
